goal: Add structured runtime trace hooks, per-step cost attribution, and price-policy wiring on top of the existing agent runtime.
successCriteria: AgentGraph and createAgent accept optional traceStore, pricePolicy, and run metadata hooks without breaking existing callers.
Each reasoning/tool step can emit enough structured data for replay, grading, and cost attribution.
Runtime defaults remain no-op when control-plane integrations are not configured.
